---
name: Build
about: Build system or external dependencies (build:)
---

## Summary

<!-- e.g. bundler, package manager, dependency bumps that affect the build -->

## Commits

Use **`build:`** or **`build(scope):`**, e.g. `build: bump vite to 6.x`.

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm install` / `pnpm build` succeed locally
- [ ] Lockfile updated when dependencies changed
